criteria_results.label: Evidence traceability
findings: Evidence refs are preserved into package and blueprint.

criteria_results.label: Opportunity scoring consistency
findings: Latest opportunity uses schema-valid scoring payload.

criteria_results.label: Blueprint completeness
findings: Latest full blueprint is schema-valid and export-ready.

criteria_results.label: Safety and non-goal compliance
findings: Forbidden execution, credential, LLM, STT, and code-generation scopes are excluded.

criteria_results.label: Interview burden
findings: MVP flow keeps the fixed intake under 24 answered prompts.

calibration_report.threshold_basis: R009 MVP target thresholds converted to deterministic fixture checks.
notes: No real pilot data is used in M7.
Threshold calibration is a report-only placeholder until a human pilot exists.
